canonical_transcript_description: ="This variant (1) differs in the 5' UTR and coding sequence compared to variant 5. The resulting isoform (OPN-a, as described in PubMed: 7837791) has a shorter and distinct N-terminus compared to isoform e."
splice_variant_description: ="This variant (3) differs in the 5' UTR and coding sequence and lacks an alternate in-frame exon compared to variant 5. The resulting isoform (OPN-c, as described in PubMed: 7837791) has a shorter and distinct N-terminus and lacks an alternate internal segment compared to isoform e."
samples: ="human glioma tissue samples and twelve normal brain tissues"
functional_description: ="Both OPN-a and -c promoted glioma cell invasion. OPN-c showed the strongest effect on glioma cell invasion, while OPN-b showed no effect on the invasion of U251 and U87 cells. OPN-b elicited the strongest anti-apoptosis effect. This show different splice variants of OPN have divergent functions in regulating apoptosis and invasion of glioma cells, which broadens their importance in glioma biotherapy."
title: ="Expression pattern of osteopontin splice variants and its functions on cell apoptosis and invasion in glioma cells"

functional_description: ="SRSF3-regulated alternative splicing (AS) markedly increased their oncogenic activity in glioma stem-like cells. SRSF3 is a key regulator of AS in GBM and that understanding mechanisms of mis-regulated AS could provide critical insights for developing effective therapeutic strategies against GBMs."
title: ="SRSF3-regulated RNA alternative splicing promotes glioblastoma tumorigenicity by affecting multiple cellular processes"

samples: ="31 GBM biopsies and 20 unaffected brain parenchyma controls(UC)"
functional_description: ="The physical interaction between circSMARCA5 and the splicing factor SRSF1 regulates the switch between pro- and anti-angiogenic isoforms generated by VEGFA. circSMARCA5 is an upstream regulator of pro- to anti-angiogenic VEGFA isoforms ratio within GBM cells and a highly promising GBM prognostic and prospective anti-angiogenic molecule."
title: ="CircSMARCA5 regulates VEGFA mRNA splicing and angiogenesis in glioblastoma multiforme through the binding of SRSF1"

functional_description: ="SF3B1 regulates alternative splicing of BCL2L1, promoting the anti-apoptotic Bcl-xL variant and inhibiting the pro-apoptotic Bcl-xS variant in glioblastoma. This confers resistance to apoptosis and promotes tumor progression."
title: ="SF3B1 inhibition disrupts malignancy and prolongs survival in glioblastoma patients through BCL2L1 splicing and mTOR/ß-catenin pathways imbalances"

title: ="A nuclear function for an oncogenic microRNA as a modulator of snRNA and splicing"

functional_description: ="Shorter 5' UTR splice variants of TSGA10 and GGNBP2 are preferentially expressed in brain tumors compared to normal tissue. Shorter 5' UTR transcripts may have higher translation efficiency, increasing expression of TSGA10 and GGNBP2. TSGA10 and GGNBP2 act as tumor suppressors, so increased expression due to splicing may suppress angiogenesis and metastasis."
title: ="Identification of TSGA10 and GGNBP2 splicing variants in 5' untranslated region with distinct expression profiles in brain tumor samples"
